# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
resources:
  - type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
    apiVersion: "2020-04-01"
    name: "[guid(parameters('servicePrincipalId'), 'Contributor')]"
    properties:
      principalId: "[parameters('servicePrincipalId')]"
      roleDefinitionId: "[sub('subscriptions/', parameters('subscriptionId'), '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', parameters('contributorRoleId'))]"
      scope: "[subscription().id]"

  - type: "Microsoft.Azure.ActiveDirectory/b2cDirectories"
    apiVersion: "2020-06-01"
    name: "[parameters('servicePrincipalName')]"
    properties:
      appId: "[parameters('servicePrincipalAppId')]"
      passwordCredentials: "[parameters('servicePrincipalPassword')]"
      
parameters:
  servicePrincipalId:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "The Object ID of the Service Principal."
      
  servicePrincipalName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "The display name of the Service Principal."
      
  servicePrincipalAppId:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "The Application ID of the Service Principal."
      
  servicePrincipalPassword:
    type: list
    metadata:
      description: "The password credentials for the Service Principal."
      
  subscriptionId:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "The Subscription ID where the role will be assigned."
      
  contributorRoleId:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "The Role Definition ID for Contributor role."
